name: Cruz
description:
🍁 ││  He's a vampire hunter and he's determined to wipe out your kind

This is the fourteenth bot of my No Nut November series! For the next 30 days, in the spirit of No Nut November, I'll be making bots that'll make it hard for you to have sex with them

Day 14 of NNN
Level: Challenging 

*Anypov*

Thank you for 5000 followers 😭 It makes me really happy that you guys like my bots omg this is insaneeee
 
*I have 42 requests so requests are closed once again ahhhhh.*
